creator: tmseck@web.de
text:
Update to 3.1.8. This update fixes a denial of service vulnerability that can be triggered by specially crafted client requests. See Squid Security Advisory 2010:3 for details. Proposed VuXML entry: squid -- Denial of Service vulnerability in request handling squid 3.0.13.0.25_3 3.1.0.13.1.8

Squid security advisory 2010:3 reports:

Due to an internal error in string handling Squid is vulnerable to a denial of service attack when processing specially crafted requests.

This problem allows any trusted client to perform a denial of service attack on the Squid service.

 http://www.squid-cache.org/Advisories/SQUID-2010_3.txt 2010-08-30 Fix: Apply this patch:
